results.title: Relieved Russell says Mercedes have solved his power problems mystery
results.description: Speaking to reporters ahead of this weekend's Hungarian Grand Prix, Russell said the team had found something that was "embedded in the calibration" of a code in his car's power unit management that had resulted in him losing speed.

results.title: Miami Dolphins will wear throwback jerseys one week in 2026 season
results.description: Miami Dolphins announced their new helmet for Week 14. The helmet is a throwback to the Dolphins' original logo.

results.title: Swampcast talks Florida football coach Jon Sumrall going viral at 2026 SECMD
results.description: Swampcast explains why Florida football coach Sumrall is still winning over Gator Nation with candid personality and brash approach.

results.title: ‘Many riders are ill in the bunch’ – could a stomach virus deny Tadej Pogačar at the Tour de France?
results.description: Adam Yates, Tim Wellens and Brandon McNulty, three of UAE Team Emirates-XRG’s eight-man squad, are run down with a stomach infection. McNulty left on stage 18 – will Tadej Pogačar safely make it to Paris?

results.title: CHIMP SPORT: Baby Victoria Pearls Host Rwanda in U19 World Cup Qualifiers Preps

results.title: Guard Nevena Nogic moves north to join Timberwolves
results.description: The Kamloops basketball player was with UBC Okanagan last season
